sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for Huntington Beach, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: inventory competition versus pending demand. Primary keyword: Huntington Beach housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Huntington Beach housing market; Huntington Beach real estate market update; Huntington Beach home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Huntington Beach; Huntington Beach home selling market; Huntington Beach homes for sale inventory; Huntington Beach days on market; Huntington Beach listing price; Huntington Beach seller market; Huntington Beach housing market 2026; Huntington Beach market update sellers; Huntington Beach median home price; are home prices dropping in Huntington Beach; is now a good time to sell in Huntington Beach. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
